title: 无标题文章
summary: I wonder how popular a "buy the game on a Disc" service on GOG would be? The games are already DRM-free, on checkout one could tick a box and get a physical delivery for games in the cart. Obviously this would be a logistics nightmare to burn on demand, but a nice feature.
content: I wonder how popular a "buy the game on a Disc" service on GOG would be? The games are already DRM-free, on checkout one could tick a box and get a physical delivery for games in the cart. Obviously this would be a logistics nightmare to burn on demand, but a nice feature.
